name: Active Directory Privilege Escalation
description: Attack tree modelling escalation from a standard domain user to Domain Admin via common Active Directory attack paths including Kerberoasting, DCSync, and Golden Ticket
root_objective: Escalate from domain user to Domain Admin and establish persistence

nodes.title: Achieve Domain Admin Privileges
nodes.description: Escalate from standard domain user to Domain Administrator and establish persistent control of the AD forest

nodes.title: Obtain Initial Domain Foothold
nodes.description: Gain access as any authenticated domain user

nodes.title: Phish Domain User Credentials
nodes.description: Send targeted phishing to harvest credentials via a fake SSO page

nodes.title: Exploit Password Spraying
nodes.description: Spray common passwords against all domain accounts via LDAP or SMB

nodes.title: Escalate to Privileged Account
nodes.description: Move from standard user to a high-privilege service or admin account

nodes.title: Kerberoast Service Accounts
nodes.description: Request TGS tickets for service accounts with SPNs and crack them offline to reveal passwords

nodes.title: LSASS Credential Dumping
nodes.description: Extract credentials from LSASS process memory on compromised workstations using Mimikatz or Task Manager

nodes.title: Exploit AD Certificate Services (ESC1-ESC8)
nodes.description: Abuse misconfigured ADCS certificate templates to obtain certificates as privileged users

nodes.title: Achieve Domain Admin
nodes.description: Obtain Domain Admin or equivalent (Enterprise Admin, DC local admin) privileges

nodes.title: DCSync Attack
nodes.description: Use replication privileges (GetChangesAll) to replicate the NTDS.dit password hashes from a Domain Controller

nodes.title: Pass-the-Hash to Domain Controller
nodes.description: Use captured NTLM hash of a DA account to authenticate directly to a Domain Controller

nodes.title: Establish Persistence
nodes.description: Create durable persistence mechanisms that survive password changes

nodes.title: Forge Golden Ticket
nodes.description: Extract the KRBTGT hash to forge Kerberos TGTs for any account indefinitely

nodes.title: Install Skeleton Key
nodes.description: Patch LSASS on DCs with a skeleton key allowing any password to authenticate as any user
